name: Rancho San Antonio Beef Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place the beef in a shallow pan and pour the marinade over it, ensuring the meat is well coated.
3. Refrigerate the beef for 3-4 hours to allow the marinade to penetrate the meat.
4. Turn the beef occasionally while marinating to ensure even coating.
5. Before cooking, do not shake off the liquid from the marinade.
